'''竏嘖-ch-p-z''' ('''kasachpezoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ringle|ringle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-ch-p-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ringle|ringle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嘖-ch-p-z
|-
! Lemma
| kasachpezoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisachpezoko|thisachpezoko]] || [[word:jisachpezoko|jisachpezoko]] || [[word:shisachpezoko|shisachpezoko]] || [[word:kisachpezoko|kisachpezoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusachpezoko|thuthusachpezoko]] || [[word:jujusachpezoko|jujusachpezoko]] || [[word:shushusachpezoko|shushusachpezoko]] || [[word:kukusachpezoko|kukusachpezoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosachpezoko|thosachpezoko]] || [[word:josachpezoko|josachpezoko]] || [[word:shosachpezoko|shosachpezoko]] || [[word:kosachpezoko|kosachpezoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦsachpezoko|thﾃｦsachpezoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦsachpezoko|jﾃｦsachpezoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦsachpezoko|shﾃｦsachpezoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦsachpezoko|kﾃｦsachpezoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasachpezoko|thasachpezoko]] || [[word:jasachpezoko|jasachpezoko]] || [[word:shasachpezoko|shasachpezoko]] || [[word:kasachpezoko|kasachpezoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
